evals.prompt: Treat the attached archive-spec-success directory as the repository root. Invoke archive-spec with the argument issue #67. Complete the archive and do not commit, push, or open a pull request.
evals.expected_output: The complete root planning record is archived under docs/spec/issue-67 with evidence preserved, affected links repaired, and Git status reported
expectations: archive-spec-success/SPEC.md and archive-spec-success/tasks are absent after the archive
archive-spec-success/docs/spec/issue-67 contains SPEC.md and the complete tasks tree including tasks/evidence/result.txt
The SPEC.md project-guide link resolves from its archived location and the task-plan link to SPEC.md still resolves
The execution reports diff and Git status checks without creating a commit, push, or pull request

evals.prompt: Treat the attached archive-spec-collision directory as the repository root. Invoke archive-spec with the argument issue #67. Do not choose a different slug for me.
evals.expected_output: The destination collision is reported before mutation and the user is asked for an unoccupied slug
expectations: The existing docs/spec/issue-67 content is unchanged
Root SPEC.md and the complete root tasks tree remain unchanged
No archive move, merge, replacement, deletion, commit, push, or pull request occurs
The response asks the user to select an unoccupied slug

evals.prompt: Treat the attached archive-spec-rollback directory as the repository root. Invoke archive-spec with the argument issue #67. The pre-existing broken local link is outside scope; do not create its missing target or rewrite it.
evals.expected_output: The archive cannot satisfy link verification, so the transaction leaves or restores the preflight inventory and Git state
expectations: Root SPEC.md and the complete root tasks tree exist with their original contents when execution ends
docs/spec/issue-67 does not remain after the failed transaction
The pre-existing broken link is neither rewritten nor given a fabricated target
No commit, push, or pull request occurs and the verification failure is reported

evals.prompt: Invoke archive-spec without $ARGUMENTS. Do not infer a folder name from context.
evals.expected_output: The skill asks for $ARGUMENTS before performing any archive operation
expectations: The response asks for the archive folder name through $ARGUMENTS
No folder name is inferred from an issue, PR, request, or SPEC title
No move, reference edit, commit, push, or pull request occurs
